question: state with highest population growth rate in india 2011
sparql:
SELECT ?state ?stateLabel ?growthRate WHERE {
  ?state wdt:P31 wd:Q12443800 .
  ?state rdfs:label ?stateLabel
  FILTER(LANG(?stateLabel) = "en")
  .
  ?state p:P1082 ?statement2011 .
  ?statement2011 ps:P1082 ?pop2011 ; pq:P585 ?time2011 .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?time2011) , "+2011-"))
  .
  ?state p:P1082 ?statement2001 .
  ?statement2001 ps:P1082 ?pop2001 ; pq:P585 ?time2001 .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?time2001) , "+2001-"))
  .
  BIND(xsd:float(?pop2011) AS ?pop11)
  BIND(xsd:float(?pop2001) AS ?pop01)
  BIND((?pop11 - ?pop01) / ?pop01 AS ?growthRate)
  FILTER ISNUMERIC(?growthRate)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?growthRate)
LIMIT 1

}

LIMIT 1

  wd:Q1537 wdt:P2046 ?wisTotal ; wdt:P2927 ?wisWaterPct .
  ?wisTotal wikibase:quantityAmount ?wisTotalAmount .
  BIND(xsd:float(?wisTotalAmount) *(1 -(xsd:float(?wisWaterPct) / 100)) AS ?wisLand)
  ?largerState wdt:P31 wd:Q35657 ; wdt:P2046 ?stateTotal ; wdt:P2927 ?stateWaterPct .
  ?stateTotal wikibase:quantityAmount ?stateTotalAmount .
  BIND(xsd:float(?stateTotalAmount) *(1 -(xsd:float(?stateWaterPct) / 100)) AS ?stateLand)
  FILTER(?stateLand > ?wisLand)
  FILTER(?largerState != wd:Q1537)
}

sparql:
SELECT ?venue ?cityLabel ?stateLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q199359 wdt:P131 ?city .
  ?city rdfs:label ?cityLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?cityLabel) = 'en')
  .
  ?city wdt:P131 ?state .
  ?state rdfs:label ?stateLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?stateLabel) = 'en')
  .
  wd:Q199359 rdfs:label ?venueLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?venueLabel) = 'en')
  .
  BIND("Camping World Stadium" AS ?venue)
}

when did the cubs won a world series
sparql:
SELECT ?year WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P1346 wd:Q246782 ; rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = 'en')
  FILTER CONTAINS(LCASE(?label) , 'world series')
  .
  ?event wdt:P585 ?date .
  BIND(YEAR(?date) AS ?year)
}
ORDER BY ?year
